'''kohawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgemental|judgemental]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgemental|judgemental]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kohawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohawithi|kohawithi]] || [[word:kohawiji|kohawiji]] || [[word:kohawishi|kohawishi]] || [[word:kohawiki|kohawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohawuthuthu|kohawuthuthu]] || [[word:kohawujuju|kohawujuju]] || [[word:kohawushushu|kohawushushu]] || [[word:kohawukuku|kohawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohawuthu|kohawuthu]] || [[word:kohawuju|kohawuju]] || [[word:kohawushu|kohawushu]] || [[word:kohawuku|kohawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohawufthuf|kohawufthuf]] || [[word:kohawufjuf|kohawufjuf]] || [[word:kohawufshuf|kohawufshuf]] || [[word:kohawufkuf|kohawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohawethe|kohawethe]] || [[word:kohaweje|kohaweje]] || [[word:kohaweshe|kohaweshe]] || [[word:kohaweke|kohaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohawothotho|kohawothotho]] || [[word:kohawojojo|kohawojojo]] || [[word:kohawoshosho|kohawoshosho]] || [[word:kohawokoko|kohawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohawotho|kohawotho]] || [[word:kohawojo|kohawojo]] || [[word:kohawosho|kohawosho]] || [[word:kohawoko|kohawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohawofthof|kohawofthof]] || [[word:kohawofjof|kohawofjof]] || [[word:kohawofshof|kohawofshof]] || [[word:kohawofkof|kohawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfthĂŻf|kohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfjĂŻf|kohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfshĂŻf|kohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfkĂŻf|kohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kohawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kohawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kohawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kohawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfthĂŻf|kohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfjĂŻf|kohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfshĂŻf|kohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfkĂŻf|kohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfthĂŻf|kohawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfjĂŻf|kohawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfshĂŻf|kohawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kohawĂŻfkĂŻf|kohawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohawĂŠthĂŠ|kohawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kohawĂŠjĂŠ|kohawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kohawĂŠshĂŠ|kohawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kohawĂŠkĂŠ|kohawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohawathatha|kohawathatha]] || [[word:kohawajaja|kohawajaja]] || [[word:kohawashasha|kohawashasha]] || [[word:kohawakaka|kohawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohawatha|kohawatha]] || [[word:kohawaja|kohawaja]] || [[word:kohawasha|kohawasha]] || [[word:kohawaka|kohawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohawafthaf|kohawafthaf]] || [[word:kohawafjaf|kohawafjaf]] || [[word:kohawafshaf|kohawafshaf]] || [[word:kohawafkaf|kohawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kohawasha|kohawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohawshĂ«sha|kohawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohawrosha|kohawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohawmusha|kohawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohawyasha|kohawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohawnkshĂ«sha|gokohawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohawnkrosha|gokohawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohawnkmusha|gokohawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohawnkyasha|gokohawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kohahawasha|kohahawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohahawshĂ«sha|kohahawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohahawrosha|kohahawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohahawmusha|kohahawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohahawyasha|kohahawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohahawnkshĂ«sha|gokohahawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohahawnkrosha|gokohahawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohahawnkmusha|gokohahawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohahawnkyasha|gokohahawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kehĂŠwasha|kehĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kehĂŠwshĂ«sha|kehĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kehĂŠwrosha|kehĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kehĂŠwmusha|kehĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kehĂŠwyasha|kehĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokehĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gokehĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokehĂŠwnkrosha|gokehĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokehĂŠwnkmusha|gokehĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokehĂŠwnkyasha|gokehĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kohfawasha|kohfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohfawshĂ«sha|kohfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohfawrosha|kohfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohfawmusha|kohfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohfawyasha|kohfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohfawnkshĂ«sha|gokohfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohfawnkrosha|gokohfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohfawnkmusha|gokohfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohfawnkyasha|gokohfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
